application_id.description: Id of the prospect application this record belongs to. Each prospect detail is attached to exactly one application; prospects are applications that have not yet been moved onto a job.

pool_id.description: Id of the prospect pool the prospect currently sits in (`prospect_pools.id`). `null` when the prospect has been added to the CRM without being placed in a pool yet.

pool_stage_id.description: Id of the prospect pool stage the prospect currently sits in (`prospect_pool_stages.id`). `null` when the prospect has no current stage; when set, it is always a stage that belongs to `pool_id`.

prospect_owner_id.description: Id of the Greenhouse user designated as the owner of this prospect. `null` when the prospect is unowned.

department_id.description: Id of the department recorded on the prospect's prospective department (the department the prospect is being considered for), derived from the underlying application.

office_id.description: Id of the office recorded on the prospect's prospective department (the office the prospect is being considered for), derived from the underlying application.

description: Schema for the 'prospect_details' stream, linked to the '/v3/prospect_details' endpoint.
